*Describe the bug* A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

*Steps to Reproduce* Steps to reproduce the behavior.

*Expected behavior* A clear and concise description of what you expected
to happen.

*fwupd version information* Please provide the version of the daemon and
client.

[source,shell]
----
fwupdtool get-report-metadata
fwupdtool hwids
----

Please note how you installed it (`apt`, `dnf`, `pacman`, source, etc):

*fwupd device information*

Please provide the output of the fwupd devices recognized in your
system.

[source,shell]
----
fwupdmgr get-devices --show-all-devices
----

*Additional questions*

* Operating system and version:
* Have you tried rebooting?
* Is this a regression?
